options.name: --host
options.description:
The remote hostname for a network credential. This can
include the port number.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Optional namespace for generic credentials that 
don't belong to a particular host provider.

options.name: --path
options.description:
The path with which the credential will be used. E.g.,
for accessing a remote https repository, this will be the repository's path
on the server.

options.name: --scheme
options.description:
The protocol over which the credential will be used 
(e.g., https).

options.name: --username
options.description:
The user or account to retrieve the password for, if 
using a namespace for generic credentials.

arguments.name: URL
arguments.description:
A URL used to populate options from a single value: 
[[protocol]]://[[user]]:[[password]]@[[host]]/[[path?]]
